ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the commodity belongs to */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the commodity */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* The primary country where the commodity is produced */,
  "minimum_trading_volume" INTEGER /* The minimum volume that can be traded */,
  "maximum_trading_volume" INTEGER /* The maximum volume that can be traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the commodity's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "min_price" REAL /* The minimum price for commodities in this category */,
  "max_price" REAL /* The maximum price for commodities in this category */,
  "average_price" REAL /* The average price for commodities in this category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the category's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the commodity */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the commodity */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the commodity */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the commodity */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the commodity */,
  "change" REAL /* The change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* The percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* The change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "volume_change_percentage" REAL /* The percentage change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* A rating indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "source_accuracy" TEXT /* A rating indicating the accuracy of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the prediction belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the commodity */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the model used for the prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity being accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the alert belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the alert */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., price fluctuation, trading volume change) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* The source of the alert (e.g., market data, prediction model, manual input) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_users" (
  "alert_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user subscribed to the alert */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the user receives alerts (e.g., daily, weekly, real-time) */,
  "alert_method" TEXT /* The method by which the user receives alerts (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_users_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" TEXT /* A score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "accuracy_score" TEXT /* A score indicating the accuracy of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_sources" (
  "market_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_sources_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* The type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data used to train the model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last model training */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models_used" (
  "prediction_model_used_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the model used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the model usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_model_used_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_models_used_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_models_used_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictions_models ("model_id")
)
